---
name: Bug or specification issue
about: Report a problem in the spec, schemas, or test vectors
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

### Where in the spec

Cite the file path and section, e.g. `spec/v1/07-canonical-form.md` Section 7.2.

### What you expected

Describe what you understood the spec or schema to require.

### What you observed

Describe the actual behaviour, output, or text. Quote the relevant lines if it is a prose ambiguity.

### Why this matters

Briefly explain the consequence (e.g. "two correct implementations produce different signatures for the same body").

### Reproduction

If applicable, provide:

- A minimal wire message or body that exhibits the issue.
- The implementation(s) you tested with.
- The exact spec commit hash you read against.

### Suggested fix (optional)

If you have a proposal, sketch it here.
